criteria.description: deriveTrend() uses rate comparison with fixed pp tolerance band
criteria.evidence: src/lib/ai-findings.js: deriveTrend() now accepts currentChecked/prevChecked; compares rates with TREND_TOLERANCE_PP=0.02; falls back to raw-count when coverage absent.
src/lib/findings.js: optional prevCoveredUrls; sets _coverageNew when no affected page in prev set; clears on second observation.

criteria.description: buildAiFindings() passes engine pagesScanned to deriveTrend()
criteria.evidence: src/lib/ai-findings.js: engineSummaryKey derived from bug.engine_key; currentChecked/prevChecked extracted from summary/prev and passed to deriveTrend().

criteria.description: diffWeeks() filters appeared/changed by rate rather than raw counts
criteria.evidence: src/aggregate.js: diffEngine() receives prevScanned/currScanned; appeared filtered by expectedInPrevSample >= 1; changed filtered by |rate delta| > DIFF_TOLERANCE_PP.

criteria.description: changeList() shows rates alongside raw counts in HTML
criteria.evidence: src/report-html.js: changeList() appends (rate: N% -> M% of pages scanned) when prevScanned and currScanned are available.
tests/unit/findings.test.js: 'no _coverageNew when prevCoveredUrls is absent' passes.

criteria.description: deriveTrend() falls back to raw-count when coverage absent
criteria.evidence: tests/unit/ai-findings.test.js: 'trend is worsening when pages increased (no coverage data → raw-count fallback)' passes.
